name: Jiangsu Riying Electronics Co., Ltd.
summary: Jiangsu Riying Electronics Co., Ltd. designs, manufactures, and sells automotive washing systems and wiring harnesses. It offers washing systems for front and rear windshields, headlights, and sensors; precision injections; vehicle electronics, such as rain, temperature, and sunlight light sensors, as well as sunroof controllers; and automotive wiring harnesses and connectors. The company was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Changzhou, China.
